text:
Hello.
I approve it patch.
Thank you.

On Tue, May 15, 2012 at 10:20 PM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote=
:
> Maintainer of databases/sqlite3,

> and a committer will take care of it.
>
